initialization.instruction: Load all referenced XML modules in the specified priority order before taking action.
Treat the combined context of these files as your authoritative repository operating system.

context_modules.module: Global identity, safety, and background execution protocols.
Repository-specific workflows, priorities, and file management rules.
Technical stack, design patterns, and API design patterns and conventions.
Current progress, pending sub-tasks, and session recovery data.

agent_bootstrap.discovery: This file ('.agents/manifest.xml') is the canonical entry point for agents; any legacy pointers such as 'AGENTS.md' should delegate here.
